description_long: This is a rugged brown work boot with a high ankle collar and a sturdy black rubber sole, designed for durability and support in urban environments. The upper is made of brown leather or synthetic leather, featuring reinforced stitching and metal eyelets for the laces. The padded collar and tongue are black, providing additional comfort and ankle protection. The boot has a classic lace-up design with round brown laces threaded through six pairs of eyelets. The outsole is thick and textured, likely offering excellent grip and slip resistance on various surfaces. Subtle branding and logo details are visible on the side and tongue, enhancing its urban utility style.
description: A brown high-ankle work boot with a black padded collar, sturdy black sole, and classic lace-up design, featuring reinforced stitching and subtle branding.
description_view_0: The left rear side of the boot is visible, highlighting the padded black collar, brown upper, and the thick, textured black sole.
description_view_1: The back and right side of the boot are shown, displaying the heel, subtle logo, and the transition between the brown upper and black collar.
description_view_2: The right side and front of the boot are visible, showing the lace-up system, reinforced stitching, and branding on the side.
description_view_3: The front and left side of the boot are shown, emphasizing the toe box, laces, and the robust build of the boot.
